codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature requirements: a dedicated parameterized test suite now covers all six plan-graph validation branches with exact error-string assertions, including a cycle formed only by blockedBy edges.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the feature metadata, worker transcript skeleton, handoff, and commit 96722aa diff. The new tests in tests/plan-graph-validation.test.ts cover duplicate ids, unknown dependsOn, self-dependsOn, unknown blockedBy, self-blockedBy, and blockedBy-only cycle detection with exact phrasing checks, and the removed runtime.test cases were migrated into this focused suite.
